what_it_does: This file is a JSON allocation batch that lists six files from the claude-ds project—two Markdown documents and four HTML specimens—under a common root directory for interpretive processing.
observations: The file is a JSON array of six uniform objects
Every entry belongs to project 'claude-ds' and root '/home/tim/company/design/claude-ds'
The listed paths are README.md, SKILL.md, specimens/foundations.html, specimens/spacing-radius-elevation.html, specimens/surface-zone-registry.html, and specimens/theme-modes.html
No code symbols are present; symbols[] is empty
The directory path suggests it is part of wave-002 allocation batch-034
standouts: The batch contains only documentation and HTML specimen files, no implementation source
All entries share the same project and absolute root path
concerns: The absolute root path /home/tim/company/design/claude-ds ties the batch to a specific local filesystem layout
conventions: Uses a JSON array of objects with consistent project/path/root keys
Separates top-level docs from specimens via path grouping
notes: A scoped manifest that assigns claude-ds README, SKILL, and four HTML specimens to an interpretive batch.
questions: What selection criteria placed these six specific files in batch-034?
Is the batch intended to be interpreted as a single thematic unit?
purpose_vs_actual: The file acts as an allocation manifest for interpretive work, and its content matches that purpose by enumerating target files.
intention_signals: It appears to package a coherent slice of the claude-ds design system—its top-level guidance plus foundational visual-system specimens—for a focused interpretive pass.
contribution: Provides a scoped, addressable grouping of claude-ds documentation and specimen files that a fused system can treat as an input set for an interpretive wave.
summary_for_embedding: A JSON allocation batch listing six claude-ds files—README.md, SKILL.md, and four HTML specimens—for interpretive processing in wave-002.
intention_for_embedding: To assign a focused subset of claude-ds design-system documentation and specimens to an interpretive batch.
